title: Mobile user - Guest, log in, log out - app data changes correctly
scenario: App data fields (Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected) update correctly across Guest login, Lens tenant login, and logout states
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. From the Home screen, navigate to Account settings.
3. Observe the fields: Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected.
4. Perform Guest login (or ensure the app is in Guest mode / logged out state).
5. Verify the fields: Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected.
6. Log in to a Lens tenant using valid credentials.
8. Observe the fields: Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected.
9. Log out from the Lens tenant.
11. Observe the fields: Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected.
expected: When in Guest mode or logged out: Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected should display 'None' or 'Unknown'. When logged in to a Lens tenant: Tenant name and Tenant ID should show the correct tenant data, User ID should show the correct user identifier, and Last Connected should display the correct connection date/time.
